allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,v\) for k,v in {**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}.items\(\) if 'supa' in k.lower\(\)]")
Bash(node -e "const { jsPDF } = require\('jspdf'\); const doc = new jsPDF\(\); console.log\(typeof doc.autoTable\);")
Bash(node -e "const { jsPDF } = require\('jspdf'\); require\('jspdf-autotable'\); const doc = new jsPDF\(\); console.log\(typeof doc.autoTable\);")
